name: python3-condense-json
title: python3-condense-json
summary: Python function for condensing JSON using replacement strings
description:
Python function for condensing JSON using replacement strings
The `condense_json` function searches a JSON-like object for strings
that contain specified replacement substrings. It replaces these
substrings with a compact representation, making the JSON more
concise.
.
This is mostly used as a dependency for the llm package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-condense-json because Python function for condensing JSON using replacement strings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-condense-json as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-condense-json with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-condense-json --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
